title: Whole Cake Island Comes Into View
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Pudding, Pekoms, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3 as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Having lost their guide, pekoms, luffy and his party...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The tea party draws near! Now, off to save Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: set off for where the yonkou big mom is, whole cake island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your concerns are much appreciated, but that's easier said than done. Besides, he's as tough as nails... I wouldn't worry about him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I really think we should look for him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: First and foremost, we need to make sure we can actually make it to whole cake island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Without getting spotted by the enemy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What sort of sweets will this town be made of?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Next is most likely a city made from Jam, I believe.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once we catch sight of the island, without approaching it,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We set our course for the direction of the #2 log pose.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even though it's gonna be so sweet?! You sure, Nami?! We're not going to go ashore even though they've got all that sweet stuff?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You heard her, chopper! Carrot! To Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Would it kill you to be a little delicate!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By keeping a safe distance from the islands, and setting course for the next one whenever we see one,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You're quite bad at that, Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can slip through the enemy's surveillance net!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see! So that's how you interpret this map!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Okay! Guys, IMA go cook you all some grub!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd DOT DUNNA BISS TUP DIS DIME, I DWARE...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I said I'll do it! So help me God if you dare step foot in the kitchen again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I wanna do some work too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We aren't gonna pay you for that food!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! The ocean's all grape- colored out there!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes. Some islands in these parts have rivers of juice that flow out directly to the sea.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a paradise that just keeps on giving!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: pedro, how is it you know so much about this area?

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 62 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
